creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
Hi!

> Synopsis: [MAINTAINER] audio/murmur: update to 1.2.0
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=141885

How about this patch:
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/murmur.patch

added -fstack-protector fix, also remove unneeded HAS_CONFIGURE
and add QMAKEFLAGS (so CC/CXX/FLAGS are respected).

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
